name: Data Analysis Pipeline
description: Comprehensive data analysis: cleaning, exploration, visualization, insights, and recommendations

steps.name: data-assessment
steps.prompt_template:
Assess this dataset. Identify data types, quality issues, missing values, and initial observations:

{{input}}

steps.name: data-cleaning
steps.prompt_template:
Provide a data cleaning strategy and cleaned dataset description. Handle missing values, outliers, and inconsistencies:

{{assessment}}

steps.name: exploratory-analysis
steps.prompt_template:
Perform exploratory data analysis. Look for patterns, correlations, distributions, and interesting findings:

{{cleaning}}

steps.name: statistical-analysis
steps.prompt_template:
Apply statistical tests and analysis. Calculate key metrics, confidence intervals, and significance:

{{exploration}}

steps.name: visualization-plan
steps.prompt_template:
Recommend data visualizations that would best illustrate the findings. Include chart types, what to plot, and insights to highlight:

{{stats}}

steps.name: business-insights
recommendations
steps.prompt_template:
Provide strategic recommendations based on the insights. Include next steps, priorities, and expected outcomes:

{{insights}}

steps.name: final-report
